title: Infosys Completes Merger of German Step-Down Subsidiaries
detailed_summary: Infosys reported that the merger between two wholly owned step-down subsidiaries, Infosys Germany GmbH and Blitz 24-893 SE, was completed on September 24, 2025. The resultant entity is named Infosys Germany SE. No financial terms, business impact, or strategic rationale were disclosed.

key_facts.fact: The merger between Infosys Germany GmbH and Blitz 24-893 SE was completed on September 24, 2025.
Infosys Germany GmbH and Blitz 24-893 SE were described as two wholly owned step down subsidiaries.
The name of the resultant entity is Infosys Germany SE.
